steps.title: Spot the contrast signal
steps.content: The opening sentence establishes “Most solar eclipses from long ago have been forgotten, but not all.” This “but not all” sets up an expectation that the next sentence will provide a specific eclipse that was remembered—an example illustrating the exception to the general rule.

steps.title: Choose the matching transition
steps.content:
”For example” directly introduces a specific instance that proves the “but not all” claim.

Next implies sequencing, Regardless implies dismissal or contradiction, and In summary implies conclusion—none of which fit the need to present a concrete example.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
